flow.purpose: Listens for inbound leads from various marketing channels (Google Forms, Facebook Lead Ads, Web Intake).
Parses standard incoming lead structure to extract variables such as budget, timeline, source, and contact details.

Validates email format, normalizes phone numbers, and rejects spam data (e.g., disposable emails, known spam domains, fake numbers). Throws an error to the dead-letter queue if invalid or flagged as spam.
Analyzes the lead's notes to determine sentiment, urgency, and extracts missing vehicle preferences automatically.
Applies AI Lead Scoring logic based on budget, timeline, and source to assign an ai_score and determine priority (HOT, WARM, COLD).
flow.logic: score = calculateScore(budget, timeline, source); priority = score >= 60 ? 'HOT' : score >= 40 ? 'WARM' : 'COLD';

modules.purpose: Create CRM Lead with priority HOT.

modules.message: Thank you for your interest in {{lead.vehicle_interest}}! Our team will contact you within 1 hour. - AutoDealer Cars
modules.purpose: Send WhatsApp Confirmation to the prospect.

modules.message: 🔥 URGENT HOT LEAD: {{lead.name}} - {{lead.vehicle_interest}} (Budget: AED {{lead.budget_aed}}) - Score: {{lead.ai_score}}/100. Call immediately!
modules.purpose: Notify Sales Team of the urgent lead.

modules.subject: Welcome to AutoDealer Cars!
modules.html:
Thank you for your interest!

We received your inquiry about {{lead.vehicle_interest}}. A member of our team will be in touch shortly.
modules.purpose: Send Welcome Email to the prospect.
